# Data Source: auth0_rate_limit_policy

Data source to retrieve a single Rate Limit Policy by ID. (EA only)

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "auth0_rate_limit_policy" "example" {
  policy_id = "rlp_XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `policy_id` (String) The ID of the Rate Limit Policy. (EA only)

### Read-Only

- `configuration` (List of Object) The throttling configuration applied when the rate limit is reached. (EA only) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--configuration))
- `consumer` (String) The consumer category the policy applies to. Currently only `client` is supported. (EA only)
- `consumer_selector` (String) Identifier or category within the consumer to which the policy applies. Supported values: `client_id:<client_id>`, `client_id:<cimd_uri>`, `cimd_clients`, `third_party_clients`, or `default`. (EA only)
- `created_at` (String) The date and time when the rate limit policy was created.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `resource` (String) The resource the policy applies to. Currently only `oauth_authentication_api` is supported. (EA only)
- `updated_at` (String) The date and time when the rate limit policy was last updated.

<a id="nestedatt--configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `configuration`

Read-Only:

- `action` (String)
- `limit` (Number)
- `redirect_uri` (String)
